retry_reason: Put operations are one-shot; retrying would cause double-release and use-after-free.
contract_summary: __clear_retrans_timer is a put wrapper that releases a reference on the l2cap_chan provided. It calls l2cap_clear_timer, which decrements the channel's kref count. After calling, the caller must not use the channel pointer without first acquiring a new reference. This macro is typically used in cleanup or error paths to drop a previously held reference. The caller must ensure that the channel's reference count is valid (>=1) before this call; use after the put is not allowed.
